messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: On it. HTTP 429 rate spiked from near-zero to 38% of all responses. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: iris_nakamura
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Root cause: The fixed-window counter was applied at the global service level rather than per.... Rolling back.

messages.author: dave_patel
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
